title: First Signal
desc: Open the one-sheet, visit the major zones, identify one system, one support task, and one cyber defense task.

title: Photo to Inventory
desc: Turn equipment photos into a draft inventory list with model, likely role, rack location, and unknowns.

title: Ticket Cleanup
desc: Review open tasks and mark items waiting on Steve or another outside party as Pending Outside Input.

title: Badge Criteria Draft
desc: Write the completion checklist for one mission badge using clear student-facing language.

title: ACE Scenario Pack
desc: Draft three simulated help desk tickets tied to Windows, Linux, networking, or account support.

title: Tour Stop Script
desc: Write a one-minute explanation for one zone using what students see, what they do, and why it matters.
